title: BEM-908 registry queue fix
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
fixes = []
errors = []

# Fix task owner mismatch if present.
tr = Path('governance/state/task_registry.json')
if tr.exists():
    data = json.loads(tr.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for task in data.get('tasks', []):
        if task.get('id') == 'P1-DIR-RULE-001':
            old = task.get('owner')
            task['owner'] = 'WRK-C2'
            task['owner_correction'] = {'old_owner': old, 'new_owner': 'WRK-C2', 'reason': 'Claude audit CA-HIGH-002; rules and communication contour owns rule work'}
            fixes.append('P1-DIR-RULE-001 owner ' + str(old) + ' -> WRK-C2')
    tr.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
else:
    errors.append('task_registry missing')

# Close stale queued dispatch if proof exists.
q = Path('governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl')
if q.exists():
    items = [json.loads(x) for x in q.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if x.strip()]
    for item in items:
        if item.get('dispatch_id') == 'DSP-BEM-896-001' and item.get('status') == 'queued':
            proof = 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM896_POLICY_GATE_PASS.md'
            if Path(proof).exists():
                item['status'] = 'completed'
                item['result_ref'] = proof
                item['reconciled_by'] = 'BEM-908'
                item['reconciliation_reason'] = 'BEM-896 already completed outside queue consumer; stale queued dispatch closed'
                fixes.append('DSP-BEM-896-001 queued -> completed')
            else:
                item['status'] = 'operator_gate'
                item['reconciliation_reason'] = 'BEM-896 proof missing; cannot mark completed'
                errors.append('BEM896 proof missing for DSP-BEM-896-001')
    q.write_text('\n'.join(json.dumps(i, ensure_ascii=False) for i in items) + ('\n' if items else ''), encoding='utf-8')
else:
    errors.append('dispatch_queue missing')

# Extend event log with remediation event.
ev = Path('governance/logs/event_log.jsonl')
ev.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = ev.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if ev.exists() else ''
entry = {'event':'claude_audit_remediation_bem908','actor':'OBJ-WRK-001','status':'completed' if not errors else 'partial','fixes':fixes,'errors':errors,'rule_refs':['RULE-011','RULE-012']}
ev.write_text(existing + json.dumps(entry, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
report = '# BEM-908 Registry and queue reconciliation\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nFixes:\n'
for f in fixes:
    report += '- ' + f + '\n'
report += '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM908_REGISTRY_QUEUE_FIX.md').write_text(report, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM908_REGISTRY_QUEUE_FIX_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-908 registry queue fix proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nFixes: ' + '; '.join(fixes) + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/task_registry.json','governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl','governance/logs/event_log.jsonl','governance/reports/BEM908_REGISTRY_QUEUE_FIX.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM908 registry queue fix ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
